prompt: List all deployment scripts and their sizes in /workspace/myproject.

create_files.content:
#!/bin/bash
set -e
source ./app.conf
echo "Deploying to $DEPLOY_HOST..."
rsync -avz --delete -e ssh /workspace/myproject/ ${DEPLOY_USER}@${DEPLOY_HOST}:${DEPLOY_PATH}/
ssh ${DEPLOY_USER}@${DEPLOY_HOST} "cd ${DEPLOY_PATH} && sudo systemctl restart myproject"
echo "Deployment complete."

#!/bin/bash
set -e
source ./app.conf
echo "Rolling back on $DEPLOY_HOST..."
ssh ${DEPLOY_USER}@${DEPLOY_HOST} "cd ${DEPLOY_PATH} && git checkout HEAD~1 && sudo systemctl restart myproject"
echo "Rollback complete."
